title: Strolid Leadership Call
summary: The Strolid leadership team discussed product priorities, focusing on a quick MVP launch for Vita with reporting. Fundraising needs were highlighted, leading to a proposal for a disciplined advisory board with strong industry connections. Key development priorities include Sophia reporting, VA implementation, and the website widget. Agents will immediately gain access to GPT in the portal/dialer. The team also focused on refining AI-centric marketing messages and improving dealer feedback mechanisms for operational enhancements.

decisions.description: Launch Vita as an MVP focusing on reporting capabilities.
Grant agents immediate access to GPT in the portal/dialer.
Form a disciplined advisory board with deep OEM and dealer group connections.
Prioritize finishing Sophia reporting, implementing VA, and building the website widget.
Proactively gather dealer feedback on operational improvements and new technology.

actionItems.task: Confirm workflow of automated appointment booking on DMA website.
Make a last request to David Rosenberg for fundraising assistance.
Share the last fundraising deck with Mike Sullivan.
Put together an advisory board by listing, interviewing, and approaching candidates.
Look at Sophia data to identify dealers benefiting from converted appointments for case studies.
Grant everybody access to GPT tomorrow.
Build the website widget and improve dialer information organization.
Start working on go-to-market ideas for Sophia and gauge dealer willingness to pay.
Get the data right on Sophia.
Incorporate standardized questions about new technology into monthly/twice-monthly reviews.

tensions: Company is bouncing between Copilot, internal items, Vita, and Chat priorities.
Need to raise capital due to extensive roadmap and insufficient resources.
Challenge of conveying VCONIC's magnitude to large dealer groups.
Concern that dealers are not appreciating or seeing the impact of operational improvements.
Dealers typically only provide feedback when something is wrong, not positive feedback.
Dialer is a complicated desktop application, not web-based, and platforms were not built to work together.
The car business is currently struggling, impacting Strolid's market.

Plans to approach David Rosenberg and Rachel Richards for fundraising assistance.
Dave Spizac was a past advisor for the company.

A previous meeting on reducing churn and accomplished operational improvements.

Shawna Behen confirming operational improvements since the offsite meeting.
Gus incorporating standardized questions into client calls a couple of months back.
Vinnie's past experience as a general manager of a dealership.
Vinnie's preference for the dialer idea for GPT pop-up due to lead-specific context.

Vinnie's consensus on the direction: finishing Sophia tasks first.
Vinnie's past decision to swear off consultants, except for Mike Sullivan.

contributions.description: Vita can be launched quickly as an MVP focusing on reporting.
Utilize Vita's existing reporting to bypass initial internal reporting.
Strolid needs to raise capital due to extensive roadmap and insufficient resources.
Now is a strategic time to raise money due to unique market offer and lack of distribution.
Form an advisory board with deep OEM and major dealer group connections.
Link advisors to capital access and ensure their primary motive is company scaling.
VCONIC is a uniquely positioned platform and industry driver for investors.
Company must embrace being an AI company in marketing messaging.
Creative process involves throwing out initial ideas for team refinement.
Communicate operational improvements to dealers to show impact and reduce churn.
Set up a mechanism to collect feedback from client success managers about dealer sentiments.
Incorporate standardized questions about new technology into monthly reviews.
The service market (Vita) has significant potential, especially when variable departments are down.
Sophia for old leads is a strong, scalable land product with clear ROI.
Message should be that the company captures 100% opportunities using both AI and humans.
